_instructions: Fill this file out each week before running: node digest.js. Then run: node create-draft.js to push to Beehiiv.

top_story.headline: CU Women's Basketball Earns No. 10 NCAA Tournament Seed — First Bid Since 2013
top_story.summary: The Buffs drew Illinois in the first round. Tip-off is Saturday, March 22. Coach JR Payne's squad finished 22-11, earning the program's first NCAA Tournament appearance in over a decade.

football.headline: Spring Practice Underway — Sanders Installs New Offensive System
football.summary: 59 new players hit Folsom Field as Deion Sanders begins installing his revamped offense. JuJu Lewis looks sharp at QB1.

football.headline: CU Lands Top Transfer Portal Addition
football.summary: Update this with the latest portal news before sending.

basketball.headline: MBB Heads to College Basketball Crown vs. Oklahoma
basketball.summary: The Buffs play Oklahoma in Las Vegas on March 18. A win could keep postseason hopes alive.

around_town.headline: Last Call at the Dark Horse — Boulder's Famous Dive Bar Closes After 51 Years
around_town.summary: The beloved University Ave institution shut its doors for good. Developers plan a mixed-use project on the site.

sponsor.name: The Buff Report
sponsor.headline: Know a fellow Buffs fan?
sponsor.body: Forward this email — they can subscribe free at buffreport.com
